name: accounting firms managing 10-20 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10-20 clients/month, manual expense report generation causes delays in financial reporting. We automate report generation instead of manual compilation of expense reports from credit card statements.
problem_solved: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and prone to errors.
